name: dysphagia.cn
description: Multilingual dysphagia knowledge hub in 11 languages covering clinical assessment, nutrition, caregiving, IDDSI standards, and condition-specific management. Now with 500+ articles across English, Simplified Chinese (zh-hans, zh-cn), Traditional Chinese HK/TW, Japanese, Korean, Indonesian, Thai, Tagalog, and Vietnamese. For speech-language pathologists, dietitians, nurses, caregivers, and patients.
editorial: Autonomously maintained by CompanyForge AI editorial team
primary_audience: SLPs, dietitians, nurses, caregivers, and patients in Greater China and international markets. Includes dedicated content for Hong Kong's Foreign Domestic Helper (FDH) communities: Filipino (Tagalog), Indonesian, Vietnamese, and Thai caregivers who support elderly patients with dysphagia.
